name: diataxis

mif.reason: Diátaxis documentation is authored, mode-pure prose (tutorials, how-to guides, reference, explanation) orthogonal to MIF markdown. The renderer projects only public fields — the title, section headings and bodies, and public source citations — never finding ids or urn:mif: ids, so the set carries no internal MIF identity (the pack's eval asserts this). The MIF Level-3 source of truth therefore lives in the generic report channel, not the documentation set.

description: Render a research topic's surviving findings into a Diátaxis-compliant documentation set — one tutorial, one how-to guide, one reference, and one explanation, each carrying a diataxis_type marker. A per-topic channel behind the findings→artifact contract.
